name: filter
label: Filter (encoded query)
description: Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true^priority<=2'.

name: categoryField
label: Category field (tile)
description: Field whose values become the tiles (leaves), e.g. 'assignment_group' or 'priority'.

name: groupField
label: Group field (optional parent)
description: Optional field to group tiles under a parent (builds a 2-level treemap), e.g. 'priority'. Blank = a single level of tiles.

name: metric
label: Metric
description: Aggregation: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.

name: valueField
label: Value field
description: Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count'), e.g. 'business_duration'.

name: useDisplayValue
label: Use display values for labels
description: Group/label by display value (readable) instead of raw value.

name: colors
label: Colors (JSON)
description: Optional per-tile colors: a JSON array ["#2E93fA","#66DA26"] applied by order, or a map {"Hardware":"#2E93fA"} keyed by tile label or group name. Sets each leaf's 'color'.

name: maxCategories
label: Max tiles (top-N)
description: Optional limit: keep only the top-N tiles by value. Blank = all.

name: sort
label: Tile sort
description: Order tiles: none (query order), label-asc, label-desc, value-asc, value-desc. (The component can also re-sort via its own Sort property.)
